note: Curated question->subtopic backfill from the SkyCity questionnaire overview. Terse source; question blank where only a label exists.

Subtopic01.1.purpose: Transparency & reporting: is this person a natural and open communicator vs cagey?

Subtopic02.1.question: Do they understand the industry?
Subtopic02.1.purpose: Comprehension of the physical gaming industry.

Subtopic02.2.question: Do they understand the industry?
Subtopic02.2.purpose: Comprehension of the on-line gaming industry.

Subtopic02.3.purpose: Comprehension of the non-gaming side of the business.

Subtopic02.4.purpose: Whether the person is strategically minded about the transformation/strategic plan.

Subtopic02.5.purpose: Leadership in strategic change and engagement.

Subtopic03.1.purpose: Confidence in, and alignment with, the transformation.

Subtopic03.2.purpose: Depth of understanding of the issues underlying the transformation.

Subtopic03.3.question: What are the top projects within the transformation plan?
Subtopic03.3.purpose: Holistic (non-silo) company view vs focusing only on their own function.

Subtopic03.4.question: What are the top 3 priorities?
Subtopic03.4.purpose: Whether they understand and own the transformation plan.

Subtopic04.1.question: What are the issues through the regulator's eyes regarding risk management?
Subtopic04.1.purpose: Appreciation of regulatory severity, seen through the regulator's eyes.

Subtopic04.2.question: Does this person take direct responsibility for the attitudes towards the regulator?
Subtopic04.2.purpose: Management conduct / leadership shadow: direct responsibility and ownership of the stance toward the regulator.

Subtopic04.3.question: Do they respect and appreciate the role of the regulator (pain, or our best interests)?

Subtopic05.1.question: Does this person have the skills & experience to deliver the required change?
Subtopic05.1.purpose: Change capability: necessary skills and experience.

Subtopic06.1.purpose: Appreciation for the impact of delivery demands on subordinates.

Subtopic06.2.purpose: Project management: necessary skills and experience to drive delivery.

Subtopic06.3.question: Will this person keep the strategy while managing difficult BAU issues?
Subtopic06.3.purpose: Ability to deliver no matter what / establish red lines for delivery.

Subtopic07.1.purpose: Conduct at all levels: inspirational and able to hold to account.

Subtopic07.2.purpose: Push communication skill in driving culture.

Subtopic07.3.purpose: Able to establish red lines for delivery within the culture.

Subtopic08.1.purpose: Open question capturing concerns and fears (point of concern 1).

Subtopic08.2.purpose: Open question capturing concerns and fears (point of concern 2).

Subtopic08.3.purpose: Open question capturing concerns and fears (point of concern 3).
